headline: EastGroup Properties (EGP) Beats Q1 FFO Estimates
summary: EastGroup Properties (EGP) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of +2.18% and -0.40%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
